nasb.text: It was the same as happened in the days of Lot: they were eating, they were drinking, they were buying, they were selling, they were planting, they were building;

esv.text: Likewise, just as it was in the days of Lot—they were eating and drinking, buying and selling, planting and building,

cnv.text: 在羅得的時代也是這樣，人們吃喝買賣，耕種建造，

ccb.text: 又像罗得的时代，人们吃喝、做买卖、耕地、盖房。

csbs.text: 同样，就像在罗得的那些日子里发生的那样：人们继续吃喝、买卖、耕种、建造，
